items.title: Dependency manifests and lockfiles: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Editing a manifest version is sufficient, and lockfiles are generated noise that should never be reviewed or committed.

feedback.correct: Correct. Use the ecosystem tool, review declared and resolved changes, pin the package-manager version where needed, and test the exact lockfile installed in CI.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Use the ecosystem tool, review declared and resolved changes, pin the package-manager version where needed, and test the exact lockfile installed in CI.
